data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of version control, specifically tracking which version of the waiver was signed. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or data that confirm the existence of version control mechanisms or the retrieval of signed versions with associated metadata. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as outlined in the linked use case.
gaps: No evidence of version control for signed waivers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
